title: Dry Roasted Croatian Paprika Sausage Skillet
description: A mustardy and crisp Croatian dish featuring paprika, perfect for a brunch mood, made with whole30-friendly ingredients and served in a mason jar.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced sausage, paprika, chopped onion, and chopped bell pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together the mustard, coconut oil, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the mustard mixture over the sausage mixture and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a mason jar and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the mason jar from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
Store any leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
